title: 05792_ABKD_Pursuing_a_Proper_Allocation_of_the_Probability_Mass_in_Knowledge_Distillation_via_alpha-beta-Divergence
positive_examples: Advances the field of knowledge distillation (KD) which enables knowledge transfer between different models.
Theoretical insights into mode-covering and mode-seeking behaviors in KD can lead to more effective distillation objectives.
